revision.comment: aligned to the right, where it belongs
alignment to the right is ugly, and is not the usual style encountered on Wikipedia.
Ugly is Oleg's opinion. I think otherwise. Yes its unusual, but I think its obstructive otherwise.
remove tfd - list it on tfd -fine. To use an oversize message box for a one-line template is [[Wikipedia:Huge message boxes|just stupid]]
standardise fmt, asuming we're all agreed this template is only for disambiguation purposes
making it work with others. See [[Taiwan]] example
added "please". We're all polite people here.
revision.text: :''For {{{1}}}, please see [[{{{2}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: No need to be that polite in a dab-link. The shorter the better.
merging "please" from [[Template:Funky]] as suggested by [[Wikipedia:Templates for deletion/Log/2006 March 12]]
revision.text: :''For {{{1}}}, please see [[{{{2}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: rm "please". We don't write it in any other dab notices. And for a good reason: the shorter the note, the better

revision.text: :''For {{{1}}}, please see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: revert, "please" is unprofessional, conveys a rather unencyclopedic tone

revision.text:
:''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''==Usage== Without any direction page, the link is "[PAGENAME] (disambiguation)" 
{{for|topic}}
{{for|topic}} 
{{for|topic|page}}
{{for|topic|page}} 
{{for|topic|page|additional page}}
{{for|topic|page|additional page}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: Revert to revision 60503104 dated 2006-06-25 16:08:35 by Freakofnurture using [[:en:Wikipedia:Tools/Navigation_popups|popups]]
Move period outside quotation marks per long-standing guideline in [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style]].
what reason is there to use quotation marks

revision.text: [[Link title]]Insert formula here == Headline text == [[Link title]]:''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

[[Image:3QTFUN-5.jpg|Right]]
 :''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: Protected Template:For: Recent vandalism attack template [edit=autoconfirmed:move=autoconfirmed]
Implemented in site-wide CSS. [[Wikipedia:Bypass your cache|bypass your cache]] to see it.
rv to see if it changes something (articles are "mangled"?)
Oh, I see. It's just missing whitespace, and forms a definition list when used consecutively, but that's not really semantically correct. Do paragraphs work right?
Add the option for fourth argument (a third item), per the discussion on the talk page.
use [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages
Changed protection level of Template:For: RFPP request ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
use [[Template:format link]] to produce neater section links
not sure what, but this breaks notes such as at [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Black_Widow_(song)&oldid=628014363 here]
performing edit request with modifications (format link no longer treats as piped links)
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: reimporting to fix errors
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: chat is this real
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: chat is this real
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 July 8#Template:For]] closed as do not merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: alignment to the right is ugly, and is not the usual style encountered on Wikipedia.
standardise fmt, asuming we're all agreed this template is only for disambiguation purposes
added "please". We're all polite people here.
revision.text: :''For {{{1}}}, please see [[{{{2}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]
:''For {{{1}}}, please see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

:''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''==Usage== Without any direction page, the link is "[PAGENAME] (disambiguation)" 
{{for|topic}}
{{for|topic}} 
{{for|topic|page}}
{{for|topic|page}} 
{{for|topic|page|additional page}}
{{for|topic|page|additional page}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: Move period outside quotation marks per long-standing guideline in [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style]].

revision.text: [[Link title]]Insert formula here == Headline text == [[Link title]]:''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

[[Image:3QTFUN-5.jpg|Right]]
 :''For {{{1}}}, see [[{{{2|{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)}}}]]{{#if:{{{3|}}}| and [[{{{3}}}]]}}.''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|For]]

revision.comment: Implemented in site-wide CSS. [[Wikipedia:Bypass your cache|bypass your cache]] to see it.
Oh, I see. It's just missing whitespace, and forms a definition list when used consecutively, but that's not really semantically correct. Do paragraphs work right?
Add the option for fourth argument (a third item), per the discussion on the talk page.
use [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages
use [[Template:format link]] to produce neater section links
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.12|XFDcloser]])

rv to see if it changes something (articles are "mangled"?)
Oh, I see. It's just missing whitespace, and forms a definition list when used consecutively, but that's not really semantically correct. Do paragraphs work right?
Add the option for fourth argument (a third item), per the discussion on the talk page.
use [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages
use [[Template:format link]] to produce neater section links
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=For here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=For for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#invoke:For|For}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
